name: Pressure Surface
event: The current question becomes harder to postpone.

name: Opportunity Window
event: A small but real opportunity appears before certainty is complete.

name: Observer Feedback
event: An outside observer reflects the repeated pattern back to the person.

name: Cost Reality Check
event: Money, energy, and family expectations test whether the new branch is grounded.

name: Identity Threshold
event: The person must lose part of the old identity before the new one is validated.

name: Branch Lock-In
event: The repeated choice starts becoming the default future.
